data.content: Fixed the rejected settings fallback: scope refinement now stays disabled by default in the Settings UI fallback instead of forcing enabled=true. Added a regression test covering the settings-sheet source contract. Validation in /Users/cartine/foolery/work/foolery-d984: bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint (warnings only, no errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all passed. Branch work/foolery-d984-impl-20260322 pushed at commit dd058545a66d.
